violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher(bar area) was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

Chicken wings was observed held at (50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (chicken wings) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed of proper cooling procedures. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back restroom area), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

The ceilings in the (kitchen and basement) area is in poor repair. observed leak in basement ceiling and water damage and paint chipping kitchen ceiling The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024
